anomalies.description: Weak credential format detected (username: m314).  Short and common.
Weak credential format detected (email-like username: m314@q).  Unusual email format.

Weak credential format detected (password: 11172021@).  Date-based with a single special character, easily guessable. Potentially an IOC if used across multiple systems.
Presence of potential usernames and passwords, while not inherently malicious, indicates a possible credential leak or attempt to store credentials in plaintext. Requires further investigation.
